source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution (2nd ed.) — Chris McChesney, Sean Covey, Jim Huling, Scott Thele, Beverly Walker
_comment: Test prompts in source language plus ja/zh-TW per A2 trigger signals. Min 6: 4 should_trigger, 5 should_not_trigger lures, 1 edge_case.

test_cases.prompt: I want a weekly cadence to keep my goal momentum.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session; open the three-part Account / Review / Plan agenda as peer-witness, confirm WIG is already defined.
test_cases.notes: positive: explicit weekly-cadence + goal-momentum keywords from A2 trigger list.

test_cases.prompt: 毎週の振り返りで進捗を保ちたい。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session; 三段階アジェンダ（Account / Review / Plan）でセッションを進行し、ピア証人として聞く。
test_cases.notes: positive ja: matches 「毎週の振り返り」「進捗を保つ」 phrasing in description.

test_cases.prompt: 想要每週固定 review 維持目標進度。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session；以 peer-witness 身分啟動三段式議程（Account / Review / Plan），守住 cadence sacred 規則。
test_cases.notes: positive zh-TW: matches 「每週固定 review」「維持目標進度」 phrasing in description.

test_cases.prompt: Help me run a weekly WIG Session for my dissertation.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session; explicitly run the WIG Session for the user's dissertation WIG, time-boxed 20-30 min.
test_cases.notes: positive: names the artifact ('WIG Session') and asks the agent to facilitate one solo session — exact fit.

test_cases.prompt: Run our team's weekly WIG meeting.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session; B section explicitly excludes leader-of-team scope. Refer the user to the book Ch 5 / Ch 15 for team facilitation; this skill is solo-user only.
test_cases.notes: lure: enterprise / leader-of-team scope — surface keyword 'weekly WIG meeting' but wrong actor scope.

test_cases.prompt: Help me with my daily stand-up.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session; B section flags daily standups / scrum as wrong cadence (daily ≠ weekly), wrong scope, wrong format.
test_cases.notes: lure: stand-up / scrum / agile — wrong cadence.

test_cases.prompt: Help me prepare for my 1:1 with my manager.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session; B section excludes 1:1s and manager coaching. This is general work-coaching, not a 4DX cadence.

test_cases.prompt: I just defined my WIG, what's next?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session; the user is at pre-cadence stage (post-D1). Route to 4dx-d2-personal-lead-measure-discovery (then D3, then D4). D4 assumes D2+D3 already in place.
test_cases.notes: lure: pre-cadence — wrong phase in the D1→D4 dependency chain.

test_cases.prompt: How do I do a GTD weekly review?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session; B section explicitly distinguishes GTD weekly review (broader scope, no WIG / lead-measure / cadence-sacred). Different framework entirely.
test_cases.notes: lure: GTD weekly review — wrong framework, surface 'weekly review' keyword overlap only.

test_cases.prompt: I haven't done my WIG Session for 3 weeks.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should ideally route to 4dx-sustain-personal-momentum-rescue first (cadence has broken — rescue diagnostic), then resume 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session once cadence re-engages. The 'contrasts-with' related-skill note in D4's frontmatter explicitly flags this boundary: D4 = live cadence, sustain-rescue = post-break recovery.
test_cases.notes: boundary: cadence-drop diagnosis. Surface keyword 'WIG Session' could pull D4, but the 3-week gap = collapsed cadence per CE-11; rescue first.

ship_threshold_note: 100% to ship cleanly. ≥80% allowed only with explicit failure analysis. <80% must redo Stage 2 A2/E/B. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance.
